prompts.prompt: Show me the top 10 trending Kalshi markets right now by 24h volume — include ticker, title, yes price, and liquidity.
For the Kalshi market KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S202622062979C21-E12CA7BD299, what are the current yes/no bid and ask, the implied probability from the midpoint, and the bid-ask spread in cents?
Pull the full orderbook for KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S2026CD1E5D81F28-6E30FBDE5BD and tell me the dollar size I could buy Yes with <= 2 cents of slippage.
Run the market efficiency check on KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-S2026BC8725F16E4-1BA7E7F4DEC. Does yes_bid + no_bid < 100? If so, what is the implied arb edge?
Fetch the last 50 trades on KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S202628F048239CC-FE199BD14F4 and tell me net Yes vs No volume over the last hour.
Give me 1-hour candlesticks for KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S2026B1902930B9B-F1FA5E0C77D over the last 24 hours — report OHLC for Yes price and total volume per bar.

For the event KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S2026F6B762AEDA9, list all sub-markets, their yes prices, and flag any pair whose implied probabilities sum to < 100 (structural arb) or > 110 (venue overround).
List every active market in the KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-S2026EA752452A61 event and rank them by yes_ask — which single-name has the tightest spread?
Find all Kalshi markets where yes_ask is between 20 and 35 cents — I want outright longshots with a cheap premium.
Resolve the slug for event KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-S2026BC8725F16E4 and then pull the event-level candlestick for the last 7 days at 1-day granularity.
Analyze sentiment on KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S2026EB144C75D4A-C062D2B3962 using the last 24h of trades and price action — is smart money leaning Yes or No?

Use kalshi_crossref_polymarket on the Kalshi market KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S202602150E22176-FC050A30E2D and flag any sub-leg where an equivalent Polymarket market exists with >3 cent price divergence.
List every Kalshi event closing before 2026-04-25 — imminent-settlement shortlist with tickers and close times.

Walk me through a full trading workflow on KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S202676E24888D78-0EF31096FAA: current pricing, orderbook depth to fill $1,000 Yes, trade-flow direction in the last 6 hours, and a rec with risk.
Browse the series KXMVECROSSCATEGORY and tell me how many active events it has and the total 24h volume rolled up across them.
On KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-S20260B3344E1366-C1C600EA12C, are yes_bid + no_bid < 99? If so quantify the riskless edge after a 7% taker fee.
Search Kalshi for markets whose title mentions 'Victor Wembanyama' and rank by yes_ask — where is the market pricing his 35+ point line?
For the NHL-centric market KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S20268F24BEFAD58-0EA9403DBFE closing 2026-05-10, give me the current yes price, 24h volume, and the 15-min candlestick series since open.
Scan all open Kalshi markets and return the 5 with the widest yes bid-ask spread — these are the least efficiently priced right now.

Find trading opportunities on KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED-S2026D6AEEE0583A-71524DD7E33: rank each sub-leg by expected-value given current yes_ask vs a naive prior, and flag any that look structurally cheap.
